description: Reference source packet for the super-Tannakian matter lift (issue #314). The physical current algebra is strictly upstream through the hash-pinned #566 packet; this manifest declares only the trace-balanced exterior matter contract, the fermionic statistics contract, the Spin/odd-Weyl category typing, the kernel emission contract, and the MAR class declaration.

exterior_matter_contract.note: the exact block trace charges satisfy 3*(-1/3) + 2*(1/2) = 0; the balance itself is a declared contract of the conditional exterior lane, not derived here

statistics_contract.note: matter states are built from anticommuting auxiliary CAR generators; the abelian bosonic coefficient records of the screen lane are a different typed object

spin_lift.note: the kernel-block action must be lifted through a genuine double cover; a split lift is rejected against the derived unique-involution witness

category_contract.note: the fifteen-state module must be selected from the full auxiliary CAR/Fock space by the source-derived equivariant projector; representation arithmetic alone is not physical realization

kernel_emission_contract.note: the common action kernel on every realized matter tensor is emitted as data for the downstream global-form descent; the final quotient is not chosen here

mar_class.note: this packet proves the declared class nonempty by realization; uniqueness stays in the MAR lane
